entries.statement: Skill in designing and implementing data quality measurement programs, including profiling, metrics definition, scoring methodologies, and quantification of business impact.
Skill in applying data quality standards, best practices, and compliance requirements to assess, evaluate, and improve organizational data assets.
Skill in conducting data profiling to identify patterns, anomalies, and characteristics within data, including analysis of data structures and content assessment.
Skill in designing and implementing data validation procedures, verification workflows, completeness checks, and anomaly detection mechanisms.
Skill in managing data handling processes, applying data handling tools and techniques, aggregating data, and managing data throughout its lifecycle.
Skill in establishing, maintaining, and utilizing data dictionaries and metadata repositories to document data characteristics, definitions, lineage, and governance context.
Skill in defining data requirements, articulating specification needs, and translating business needs into data quality standards and expectations.
Skill in designing, implementing, and managing quality control processes for data, including process improvement and operational quality assurance.
Skill in producing data quality reporting for business and governance audiences, translating technical quality metrics into business risk and operational impact language.
Skill in managing database systems, database administration, and data management operations to ensure data integrity and accessibility.
Skill in performing data normalization, transformation, standardization, and format conversion to ensure data consistency and quality.
Skill in conducting technical business impact analysis, assessing data-related risks, and interpreting risk assessments in organizational context.
Skill in designing data architecture, frameworks, and approaches for data quality assurance, including planning and architectural specification.
Skill in designing and executing testing procedures, quality inspections, and validation testing to evaluate data and process quality.
Skill in designing and implementing AI quality management systems, including AI training data governance, monitoring, and incident management.
Skill in cataloging and classifying organizational data assets, documenting data inventory, and managing data discovery and accessibility.
Skill in collecting and monitoring data from diverse sources, establishing collection procedures, and ensuring source reliability and accessibility.
Skill in evaluating and interpreting metadata to assess data characteristics, quality, lineage, and fitness for use.
Skill in performing statistical analysis on data, applying basic statistical measures, and interpreting results to support quality assessments.
Skill in performing data query operations, accessing and extracting data from databases and repositories for analysis and quality assessment.
Skill in designing and implementing data remediation strategies to correct data quality issues and improve overall data fitness.
Skill in designing decision support systems and products that translate data quality findings into actionable business intelligence.
Skill in developing quality standards, establishing quality procedures, and implementing standardized approaches to data quality assessment and improvement.
Skill in identifying, documenting, and tracking data dependencies, lineage relationships, and impact analysis across systems and applications.
Skill in establishing data governance frameworks, defining data stewardship roles, and implementing accountability structures for data quality.
Skill in establishing continuous monitoring systems for data quality metrics, configuring alerts, and managing automated quality assurance operations.
Skill in identifying, documenting, escalating, and resolving data quality issues through established governance processes and incident workflows.
Skill in designing and implementing entity resolution algorithms, matching rules, merging strategies, and handling duplicate and overlapping records.
Skill in managing data throughout its complete lifecycle, from creation through retention, archival, and disposal, while maintaining quality standards.
